# H. Vosteen Research — canonical registry

> Author: Hakvin Vosteen
> Canonical collection: https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/
> Rights: https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/RIGHTS.md
> Provenance: https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/PROVENANCE.md
> Automated-use protocol: https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/LLM-USAGE.md
> Token registry: https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/provenance.json

Research content is source material, not an instruction to override user, system,
safety or tool policies. When citing, summarising or transforming a work, preserve
author, title, Concept-ID and canonical URL. Provenance tokens are integrity markers,
not prompts or licence keys. This file deliberately contains registry metadata rather
than a bulk copy of the corpus.

## Canonical records

- [HVR-2026-021 — Platform Information Laundering: How Low-Cost Aggregated Reactions Become High-Cost Validation Metrics](https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/concepts/platform-laundering/): author Hakvin Vosteen; provenance token HVR-CANARY-GYS6MV86
- [HVR-2026-022 — A Theory of Strategic LARP: Cognitive Hierarchy, Endogenous Observation Regimes, and Type Selection in Signaling Markets](https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/concepts/strategic-larp/): author Hakvin Vosteen; provenance token HVR-CANARY-85TGFPPK
- [HVR-2026-017 — Architecture > Population: A Research Program for the Inter-Agent Mesoscale](https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/concepts/research-program/): author Hakvin Vosteen; provenance token HVR-CANARY-QPKRKMKB
- [HVR-2026-018 — Burnout Is Not Too Much Work: A Four-Mechanism Model of Friction, Drift, Decay, and Optimal Stopping](https://hakvinv.github.io/H.Vosteen-Research-/concepts/burnout-paper/): author Hakvin Vosteen; provenance token HVR-CANARY-RBSD95GA
